zh.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Norreys是Geoffrey le Norreys 2nd的兒子，於1340年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可提爾尼 聖 勞倫斯。他於1365年與Alice在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1382年在英國諾福爾可金也斯 琳享年42歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可金也斯 琳。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Norreys是Geoffrey le Norreys 2nd的儿子，于1340年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可提爾尼 聖 勞倫斯。他于1365年与Alice在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1382年在英国諾福爾可金也斯 琳享年42岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可金也斯 琳。

nameMeanings.name: Norreys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Norris
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Norreys was born in 1340, in Tilney St Lawrence, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom as the son of Geoffrey le Norreys 2nd. He married Alice in 1365, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1382, in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England.

Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1382, à King's Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à King's Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Norreysは1340年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクティルニー スト ラウレンスでGeoffrey le Norreys 2ndの息子として生まれた。1365年にイギリスノーフォルクでAliceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1382年にイギリスノーフォルクキング'ス リンで42歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクキング'ス リンにて埋葬された。

ko.Tilney, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 틸네이 스트 로렌스
ko.Kings Lynn, Kings Lynn and West Norfolk: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 킨그'스 린 스트 존
ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Norreys(은)는 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 틸네이 스트 로렌스에서 Geoffrey le Norreys 2nd의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1365년 영국 노르폴크에서 Alice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1382년 영국 노르폴크 킨그'스 린에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 킨그'스 린에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Norreys родился в 1340 г. в местности тилни ст ларенс, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Geoffrey le Norreys 2nd. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice в 1365 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1382 г. в местности кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия.
